Pool unchanged from the 2026-06-25 sweep (same 27 requests, same 8 frozen Mon 6/29 assessments). Per-day routes are byte-identical, so each day's miles/drive/homeETA are carried from that run's LIVE TomTom routes (a fixed route's drive time doesn't change — no new TomTom calls this run).

Terri Jensen & Bill Chandler matched on Jobber's FOUND pin (street-name key variant: '590 Cherry Ridge' vs '590 North Cherry Ridge'; '24 Spring Creek Pkwy' vs '24 West Spring Creek Pkwy') — parity confirmed vs the existing cache entry within ~1–3 m.
